description_long: This object consists of two standard-sized red Coca-Cola cans, one standing upright and the other lying on its side. The cans are made of aluminum and feature the iconic white Coca-Cola script logo prominently displayed on the front, with additional branding and nutritional information on the sides and back. The surface of both cans shows visible signs of wear, including scratches, scuffs, and some faded areas, suggesting they have been handled or exposed to the elements. The tops of the cans have standard pull-tab openings, and the bottoms are slightly concave, typical of beverage cans. The overall shape is cylindrical with a slightly tapered top and bottom. The cans are empty, as indicated by the lack of visible liquid and the open pull-tabs.
description: Two worn red Coca-Cola aluminum cans, one upright and one lying down, with visible branding and surface scratches.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Coca-Cola logo and the pull-tab opening on the can lying down.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the nutritional facts and barcode, with the upright can's back label visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the barcode and partial logo, with the bottom of the lying can visible.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the Coca-Cola script on both cans and the bottom of the upright can.
attribute_label_or_branding: White Coca-Cola script logo, nutritional facts, barcode, and additional branding text in white on a red background, with some black handwritten markings.
attribute_damage_or_deformation: Visible scratches, scuffs, and faded paint on the can surfaces.
